modules.title: HTML5 & Semantic Web
subtopics: Semantic Markup: Using main, article, section, header, and footer correctly
Accessibility (a11y): Implementing ARIA roles and managing focus states
Advanced Forms: Client-side validation API and custom inputs
SEO Optimization: Meta tags, schema markup, and Core Web Vitals basics

modules.title: Modern CSS Architecture
subtopics: CSS Grid Layout: 2D layouts, grid areas, and implicit vs explicit grids
Flexbox Mastery: 1D layouts, alignment, and flex-grow properties
Responsive Design: Fluid typography, container queries, and media query breakpoints
CSS Custom Properties: Theming, math functions (calc), and variable scoping

modules.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
subtopics: Execution Context: Lexical scope, hoisting, and the variable environment
ES6+ Syntax: Destructuring, spread/rest operators, template literals, and optional chaining
DOM Manipulation: Querying elements, traversing nodes, and efficient DOM updates
Event Handling: Capturing, bubbling, event delegation, and custom events

modules.title: Advanced JavaScript
subtopics: Asynchronous JS: The Event Loop, Microtask Queue, Promises, and async/await
Closures: Memory retention, IIFEs, and the module pattern
Prototypal Inheritance: The prototype chain, Object.create, and classes under the hood
Memory Management: Garbage collection algorithms and avoiding memory leaks

modules.title: React Architecture
subtopics: Virtual DOM: Reconciliation algorithm and Fiber architecture
Hooks API: Deep dive into useEffect lifecycles and custom hook composition
State Colocation: Lifting state up vs global context vs local state
Performance: React.memo, useMemo, useCallback, and managing re-renders

modules.title: Routing & Navigation
subtopics: React Router v6: Data routers, layout routes, and loaders/actions
Dynamic Routing: URL params, query strings, and path matching mechanics
Protected Routes: Auth wrappers, navigation guards, and redirect flows
Code Splitting: React.lazy, Suspense boundaries, and chunk optimization

modules.title: Global State Management
subtopics: Redux Toolkit: Slices, immer middleware, RTK Query, and async thunks
Zustand & Jotai: Atomic state architecture and unopinionated local storage sync
Server State vs Client State: Utilizing React Query for caching, deduping, and polling
Optimistic Updates: Handling mutations and rolling back UI states on error

modules.title: Performance Optimization
subtopics: Resource Hinting: Preconnect, prefetch, and preload tags
Image Optimization: WebP/AVIF formats, srcset, and async decoding optimizations
Bundle Analysis: Tree shaking, eliminating dead code, and externalizing dependencies
Web Workers: Offloading heavy computation from the main UI thread

modules.title: Frontend Testing
subtopics: Unit Testing: Jest configuration, mocking modules, and snapshot testing
Component Testing: React Testing Library, checking ARIA accessibility visually
E2E Testing: Cypress vs Playwright, network stubbing, and visual regression
Test Driven Development (TDD): Writing tests before component implementation

modules.title: Next.js 14 & SSR
subtopics: App Router: Server Components, layouts, loading ui, and error boundaries
Rendering Strategies: SSG vs SSR vs ISR vs Client-Side rendering boundaries
Data Fetching: fetch API caching, revalidation tags, and Suspense streaming
API Routes: Serverless functions, edge runtime, and backend-for-frontend (BFF)

modules.title: Styling Solutions
subtopics: Tailwind CSS: Utility-first configurations, JIT compiler, and custom plugins
CSS-in-JS: Styled-components vs Emotion and their runtime implications
CSS Modules: Scoped hashing and local composition patterns
Design Systems: Designing reusable token libraries across standard variables

modules.title: Build Tools & Tooling
subtopics: Vite Internals: Native ESM processing, HMR (Hot Module Replacement) speed
Webpack: Loaders, plugins, tree-shaking, and minification strategies
Linting & Formatting: ESLint, Prettier, husky pre-commit hooks, and stylelint
CI/CD for UI: Automating lighthouse scores, unit tests, and CI/CD reviews

modules.title: Node.js Architecture
subtopics: V8 Engine & Libuv: Understanding the single-threaded asynchronous nature
Event Loop: Timers, pending callbacks, poll, check, and close phases
Streams & Buffers: Memory-efficient data processing for large files
Child Processes: cluster, fork, exec, and spawn for CPU-intensive tasks

modules.title: Express.js Intricacies
subtopics: Middleware Chain: next() mechanics, error boundaries, and global handlers
Router Architectures: Modular monolith setup and scalable file structures
Validation: Joi/Zod integration for sanitizing deeply nested JSON payloads
Security Headers: Helmet.js, rate limiting, and CORS policies configuration

modules.title: Relational Database Design
subtopics: ACID Properties: Atomicity, Consistency, Isolation, and Durability guarantees
Normalization: 1NF to BCNF and identifying strict functional dependencies
Indexing: B-Trees, Hash indexes, composite indexes, and query plans
Joins & Subqueries: Inner, left, right full joins vs CTEs functionally

curriculum.weeklyProject: Capstone Project: Build a real-world module exploring Backend. Understanding the core architecture.
curriculum.learningOutcome: Verified proficiency in Foundational BACKEND applications

modules.title: MongoDB Data Modeling
subtopics: Document Modeling: Embedding vs Referencing depending on relationship rules
Aggregation Pipeline: $match, $group, $lookup logic and data transformations
Replica Sets: High availability, read preferences, and write concern mechanisms
Mongoose Internals: Virtuals, pre/post save hooks, and schema discrimination

modules.title: Modern Authentication
subtopics: JWT Implementations: Algorithms, signing, verifying, and claims payloads setup
OAuth 2.0 & OIDC: Authorization code grants, implicit flows, and stateless auth
Tokens: Refresh token rotation, HTTP-only Secure Cookies vs LocalStorage
RBAC vs ABAC: Role-based policies vs Attribute-based fine-grained security rules

modules.title: High-Performance Caching
subtopics: Redis Data Types: Hashes, lists, sets, and lightning-fast geospatial indexing setups
Caching Strategies: Cache-aside, write-through, and write-behind cache implementations
Cache Invalidation: Stale-while-revalidate logic and optimal TTL calculations
Distributed Locking: Redis setnx and Redlock algorithm for concurrency problems

curriculum.learningOutcome: Verified proficiency in Intermediate Architecture & APIs applications

tasks.title: Read Documentation for MongoDB Data Modeling

modules.title: Microservices & RPC
subtopics: Service Discovery: Consul, Eureka, and API Gateway traffic integration limits
Communication: Synchronous gRPC/REST vs Asynchronous Messaging payloads
Strangler Fig Pattern: Incrementally refactoring monolithic apps down slowly
Saga Pattern: Choreography vs Orchestration for strict distributed transactions

modules.title: Message Brokers
subtopics: RabbitMQ: Exchanges (Direct, Topic, Fanout), bindings, and dedicated message queues
Apache Kafka: Distributed commit logs, topics, partitions, and clustered consumer groups
Eventual Consistency: Compensating actions and idempotency keys in queues payload logic
Dead Letter Exchanges: Handling unprocessable events gracefully and tracing event flows

modules.title: GraphQL Implementations
subtopics: Schema Definition Language (SDL): Types, interfaces, unions, and core custom scalars
Resolvers Architecture: Root levels, field levels, and managing deep contextual state
Data Fetching: Solving N+1 problem efficiently via DataLoader batching and bulk mapping
Mutations & Subscriptions: Establishing robust Real-time event streams via GraphQL WebSockets

curriculum.weeklyProject: Capstone Project: Build a real-world module exploring Backend. Splitting monolithic codebases.
curriculum.learningOutcome: Verified proficiency in Advanced Performance & Scaling applications

modules.title: WebSockets & Realtime
subtopics: Protocol Mechanics: Upgrade headers, full-duplex communication TCP streams internally
Socket.io: Rooms, namespaces, broadcasting algorithms, and fallback polling mechanisms
Scaling Realtime: Redis adapters and pub/sub synchronizations across horizontal clusters
Heartbeats: Ping/pong intervals for intelligently detecting stale client connections early

modules.title: Containerization & DevOps
subtopics: Dockerizing Node: Multi-stage builds, alpine images, and npm cache node_modules mounting
Volumes & Networks: Bridge networks vs host modes, persistent data across restarts logic
Docker Compose: Orchestrating Databases, Redis, and APIs locally seamlessly together
CI/CD Pipelines: GitHub Actions linting, unit testing, building, and pushing docker images

modules.title: Serverless Functions
subtopics: AWS Lambda: Execution contexts, handling CPU cold-starts, handler payload signatures
API Gateway: Mapping integration HTTP responses, VTL templates, and custom authorizers
DynamoDB: Single-table design strategy, partition keys, sort properties, secondary indexes
Serverless Framework: Standardizing infrastructure as code (IaC) packaging easily
